name: PFTimeline
description: Ordered road for events, phases, history, and progress over time.
responsibility: Represent ordered events, project phases, activity history, or progress over time.

requirements: Event order must be understandable without relying on spatial cues alone.
Current or active item must be programmatically clear when relevant.

composition_rules: Current position should be obvious when relevant.
anti_patterns: using a timeline when order is not meaningful
placing too much hidden metadata inside each event
